title: libpod: Track healthcheck API changes in healthcheck_unsupported.go
body:
Extra function arguments were added in #13909.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Doug Rabson <dfr@rabson.org>

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: I'm a little confused why this didn't get picked up by the FreeBSD cross build.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *dfr*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Are you sure the freebsd version is being tested and built?

> Are you sure the freebsd version is being tested and built?

I am not sure anymore. I'll try to figure out which part of the test suite is supposed to run the cross build and why freeebsd is missing.
